column1: 弟はいつも外で遊びたがっています。
column2: おとうとはいつもそとであそびたがっています。
column3: My younger brother always seems to want to play outside.
column4: 〜たがる (appears to want to do [3rd person])
column6: たがる: third-person want-to — observing that X wants to do Y
column8: たがる = 3rd person desire (observable); たい = 1st person desire
